description: Deterministic map from the v0.1 16-bucket taxonomy to the v0.2 coarse taxonomy (PLANNING.md §2.7.1). Used to fold existing gold labels (data/eval-gold.json) and DB labels through to coarse buckets without re-labeling. `creator-promo` is intentionally NOT mapped: promo is an intent, not a topic, so it was dropped as a bucket (S2c) — its gold items are listed in `exclude` and dropped from the folded eval set because they have no correct topic-bucket answer. Live promo tweets get classified by their surface topic instead.
